question: Software as a service (SaaS)
canonical_answer:
Get a backup
• First thing - a bad drive is bad

Check for loose or damaged cables

Check for overheating
• Especially if problems occur after startup

Check power supply
• Especially if new devices were added

Run hard drive diagnostics
• From the drive or computer manufacturer
• Preferably on a known-good computer

appears_in.title: Cisa Doshi
appears_in.answer:
✔Provides ability to the end users to access an application over the Internet
✔Application is hosted and managed by the service provider
✔Users are not required to maintain or control application development platform and related infrastructure
✔Google Docs, Office 365, Salesforce.com

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+
appears_in.answer: describes a general category of services related to cloud computing and remote access. It recognizes the vast number of products, tools, and technologies that are now delivered to users as a service over the internet
